'''√z-d-g''' ('''kazadag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cudden|cudden]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cudden|cudden]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √z-d-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazadag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thizadag || jizadag || shizadag || kizadag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuzadag || jujuzadag || shushuzadag || kukuzadag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuzadag || juzadag || shuzadag || kuzadag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuzadag || juzadag || shuzadag || kuzadag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thezadag || jezadag || shezadag || kezadag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothozadag || jojozadag || shoshozadag || kokozadag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thozadag || jozadag || shozadag || kozadag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thozadag || jozadag || shozadag || kozadag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zadag || zadag || zadag || zadag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zadag || zadag || zadag || zadag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zadag || zadag || zadag || zadag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zadag || zadag || zadag || zadag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæzadag || jæzadag || shæzadag || kæzadag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathazadag || jajazadag || shashazadag || kakazadag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thazadag || jazadag || shazadag || kazadag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thazadag || jazadag || shazadag || kazadag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shazadag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshazadag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishazadag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shazadagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshazadagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishazadagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shazadagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshazadagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishazadagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shazadagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshazadagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishazadagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shazadagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshazadagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishazadagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shazadagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshazadagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishazadagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shazadagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshazadagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishazadagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shazadagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshazadagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishazadagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shazadagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshazadagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishazadagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shazadagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshazadagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishazadagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shazadagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazadagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazadagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shazadagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshazadagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazadagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shazadagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshazadagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishazadagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shazadagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazadagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazadagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shazadagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshazadagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazadagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shazadagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshazadagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishazadagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shazadagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshazadagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishazadagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shazadagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshazadagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazadagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shazadagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshazadagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishazadagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shazadagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshazadagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishazadagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shazadagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazadagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazadagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
